---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
navbar: false
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

<div class="linktree">
  <img
    src="../assets/images/shakes_profile_circular_102522.png"
    class="linktree-avatar"
    alt="Shakes Dlamini"
  >
  <h1 class="linktree-name">Shakes Dlamini</h1>
  <p class="linktree-tagline">I build things to understand them.</p>

  <a href="https://pitchcasts.com" class="link-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <span class="link-title">pitchcasts</span>
    <span class="link-sub">live 2026 World Cup model</span>
  </a>

  <a href="https://github.com/shakestzd/wipnote" class="link-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <span class="link-title">wipnote</span>
    <span class="link-sub">open source</span>
  </a>

  <a href="/blog/" class="link-btn">
    <span class="link-title">Writing</span>
  </a>

  <a href="/resume/" class="link-btn">
    <span class="link-title">Resume</span>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/shakestzd" class="link-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <span class="link-title">LinkedIn</span>
  </a>
</div>
